title: Section 1
content: 1[(1) This Act may be called the Prohibition of Benami Property Transactions Act, 1988.] (2) It extends to the whole of India 2***. (3) The provisions of sections 3, 5 and 8 shall come into force at once, and the remaining provisions of this Act shall be deemed to have come into force on the 19th day of May, 1988.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-11-2016). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019).
